commands.review_summary:
The PR makes the OpenAI-compatible embedding provider read the selected configured provider's `request.allowPrivateNetwork` flag when building its SSRF policy, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +101. Total +118 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main builds the memory OpenAI-compatible embedding SSRF policy without reading `models.providers.<id>.request.allowPrivateNetwork`, matching the linked issue's missing explicit policy inheritance path. I did not run the live CLI reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can cover explicit false semantics in the helper and tests, but maintainer/security review remains needed before merge.
